quality.rationale: 结合Killing矢量守恒性质与相对论欧拉方程，多步推导自引力旋转星体流体平衡关系

origin.question: Problem 16.17. Show that for a rigidly rotating, self-gravitating, perfect fluid star$$\nabla \mathbf {p} = (\rho + \mathbf {p}) \nabla \log \mathbf {u}^{\mathrm {t}}.$$Here $\mathbf{u}^{\dagger}$ is a component of the 4-velocity of the fluid in the canonical coordinate system adapted to the Killing vectors (i.e. $\pmb{\xi}_{(t)} = \partial/\partial t, \pmb{\xi}_{(\phi)} = \partial/\partial \phi$ ).
origin.solution:
Solution 16.17. The non-vanishing components of the fluid 4-velocity are $\mathbf{u}^{\mathrm{t}}$ and $\mathbf{u}^{\phi} = \Omega \mathbf{u}^{\mathrm{t}}$ , i.e.$$\mathbf {u} = \mathbf {u}^{\mathrm {t}} \left( rac {\partial}{\partial \mathbf {t}} + \Omega  rac {\partial}{\partial \phi}ight).$$Let$$\pmb {\xi} =  rac {\partial}{\partial t} + \Omega  rac {\partial}{\partial \phi} = \pmb {\xi}_{(t)} + \Omega \pmb {\xi}_{(\phi)}.$$Then $\pmb{\xi}$ is a Killing vector, since $\Omega$ is a constant. By Problem 10.14, we have$$
abla_{\mathbf {u}} \mathbf {u} = 
abla \log |  oldsymbol {\xi} \cdot  oldsymbol {\xi} |^{ rac {1}{2}}$$where, since $\mathbf{u} \cdot \mathbf{u} = -1$ , $|\pmb{\xi} \cdot \pmb{\xi}|^{ rac{1}{2}} = 1 / \mathbf{u}^{\mathbf{t}}$ . Thus, the Euler equation (see Problem 14.3) for the fluid becomes$$(ho + p) 
abla \log (u^{t})^{- 1} = - 
abla p - (
abla_{(u^{t} \xi)} p) u.$$Since $\mathfrak{p}$ is independent of $t$ and $\phi$ , it follows that $
abla_{\xi} \mathfrak{p} = 0$ . Thus,$$(ho + p) 
abla \log u^{t} = 
abla p.$$
